title: Graphephorum cooleyi
intro: Graphephorum cooleyi, also known as Bear's Paw or Cooley's Lupine, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States. Traditionally, Graphephorum cooleyi has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. Graphephorum cooleyi is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in topical creams and salves to support skin health and wound healing.
